title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Delhivery Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Delhivery Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Category Manager looking for your next big career move? Delhivery Ventures Solutions in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
